title: stachys officinalis f. stricta
intro: Stachys officinalis f. stricta, also known as upright hedgenettle or strict betony, is a subspecies of the Stachys officinalis plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This perennial herb has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Stachys officinalis f. stricta include reducing anxiety and stress, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or by extracting the active compounds with a solvent.
